_comment: Provider registry -- add any OpenAI-compatible provider here without code changes.
_usage: Each provider entry defines how to discover itself from env vars. Users can add/remove/reorder providers by editing this file or setting environment variables. See .env.example for available env vars.
_instructions: Copy .env.example to .env and set your API key(s).
Supported: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, SILICONFLOW_API_KEY, CUSTOM_LLM_API_KEY
Providers are auto-discovered from env vars and sorted by priority (lower = first used).
Edit this file to add/remove/reorder providers without code changes.
You can set any model name in the env var (e.g. SILICONFLOW_MODEL for the model to use).
